# Rufinamide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Rufinamide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Rufinamide</strong> 目前有 <strong>30 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Rufinamide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Inovelon is indicated as adjunctive therapy in the treatment of seizures associated with Lennox Gastaut syndrome in patients 4 years of age and older.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>Lennox-Gastaut syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>febrile infection-related epilepsy syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>perioral myoclonia with absences（99.5%）</li>
<li>photosensitive occipital lobe epilepsy（99.4%）</li>
<li>cryptogenic late-onset epileptic spasms（99.4%）</li>
<li>atypical childhood epilepsy with centrotemporal spikes（99.4%）</li>
<li>cutis verticis gyrata（98.7%）</li>
<li>trigeminal nerve neoplasm（97.9%）</li>
<li>benign occipital epilepsy（97.8%）</li>
<li>childhood onset epileptic encephalopathy（97.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/rufinamide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
